channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped bags containing waste material/debris, 29th April
item.description:
Dumped bags containing waste material and/or other debris - not sure exactly. Bags are there for over 4 months. That part of road leads is a side entrance onto green grassy park land.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Miles Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 29th April
item.description:
This litter's been here for a while, and it's becoming a problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gilbert Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Skip and waste abandoned, 29th April
item.description:
I have just move into a property there is loads of rubbish that has been left it’s a trip hazard, it is preventing me to renovate, there is prams, bbqs, car seats along with multiple other things
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walsham Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree snapped in 2, 29th April
item.description:
The tree has snapped and a large part is sitting across the grass verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Tagging, 29th April
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: School sign on lamppost, 29th April
item.description:
Sign has been turned yet again by the wind.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Edgebury, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottles and litter, 29th April
item.description:
Bottles and litter been here for MONTHS. Reported several times but seems no action as no organisation wants to take responsibility. Grass has been cut and this detritus is just left. No photos as driving and not safe to stop. This is the third time I am reporting this. If you can cut the grass, clear the litter! This is not an area that would be safe for any volunteer litterpickers either. So should have been done when the grass was done.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163,165, Woodside Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded Forest Lime Bikes Swiss court., 29th April
item.description:
Overcrowded Forest Lime Bikes Swiss court blocking Pavement Whitcomb Street TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of Rubbish, 29th April
item.description:
This is not acceptable please remove. This building is not vacant and is being repaired however has now become a dumping ground. On the main site and corner of a LTBus Stop E

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin - spewing litter everywhere, 29th April
item.description:
This bin used to belong to Brewdog but the pub has been closed for a while. The bin is now overflowing and being used for general rubbish - with litter now blowing everywhere. It does let seem to be getting emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-10, Horselydown Lane, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation growing through pavement, 29th April
item.description:
As above.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer, 29th April
item.description:
Fridge freezer fly tipped outside Residential property This fly tip was put there by the resident at 116 carltton Road Erith. This happens on a regular basis
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: URGENT: Dangerous tree – request for ownership confirmation and safety action (Previous Ref: 9360384), 29th April
item.description:
Dear Highways / Parks Team, I am writing regarding report reference 9360384 submitted via FixMyStreet. The tree in question is not within my property boundary and, according to HM Land Registry, the land appears to be unregistered. However, the tree is adjacent to my property and presents an ongoing safety risk. There have been multiple incidents of large falling branches, and one has already struck my son on the head. This raises serious concerns about the risk of further injury. In addition, my daughter has clinically significant anaphylactic allergies (under the care of St Thomas’ Hospital and prescribed adrenaline auto-injectors). The tree produces pollen/seeds that are triggering allergic responses, further increasing the risk to her health. Given the above, I would be grateful if you could: 1. Confirm whether this land/tree is owned, adopted, or maintained by the London Borough of Bexley, or by a third party (e.g. a housing association or managing agent), and 2. If it falls under your responsibility, arrange for an urgent safety inspection and appropriate remedial works, or 3. If not your responsibility, formally advise who is responsible so I can escalate this matter appropriately Given that there has already been an injury and there is a foreseeable risk of further harm, I would appreciate this being treated as a priority safety issue. I look forward to your response. Kind regards, Sarah Kiley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti, 29th April
item.description:
Offensive graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant level of trash strewn throughout Alvington Crescent, 29th April
item.description:
I reported this a couple days ago but the problem was improperly marked "fixed" - see some attached photos from this evening (there's more that can't be uploaded). Please arrange for the trash all over Alvington Cres to be collected.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alvington Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branch fallen onto path, 29th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed green waste bin collection today, 29th April
item.description:
My green waste bin (80 Revelon Road), although positioned on the pavement in the correct place, was not emptied today. Our neighbour’s was, hence i can only assumed it was missed. When will it be collected as it is full? Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48-78, Revelon Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 29th April
item.description:
A deep pothole has opened up on the edge of the speed hump, right next to the junction with Pines Road & on the same side of the carriageway, please repair.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned mattress, 29th April
item.description:
Noted today, people keep duping rubbish despite the installation of cameras at the junction with Charlton Church lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bags and suitcase left on street, 29th April
item.description:
Please clear this rubbish that has been left, things are now being added to it! It’s been here a while. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
